ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_date" TEXT /* Date of the market data entry */,
  "maturity_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the maturity date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the contract */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the contract */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the contract during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the contract during the day */,
  "avg_price" REAL /* Average price of the contract during the day */,
  "settlement_price" REAL /* Settlement price of the contract */,
  "settlement_d1" REAL /* Settlement price of the contract (Day 1) */,
  "total_contracts" INTEGER /* Total number of contracts traded */,
  "business_days_to_maturity" INTEGER /* Number of business days until maturity */,
  "maturity_number" INTEGER /* Sequential number of the maturity */,
  "previous_close_price" REAL /* Previous closing price of the contract */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Difference between current closing price and previous closing price */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in closing price */,
  "trade_count" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed for a contract on a particular day */,
  "trade_value" REAL /* Total value of trades executed for a contract on a particular day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_date", "maturity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maturities" (
  "maturity_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the maturity date */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date of maturity */,
  "maturity_number" INTEGER /* Sequential number of the maturity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maturity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "contract_name" TEXT /* Name of the contract */,
  "maturity_id" TEXT /* Reference to the maturity date */,
  "contract_size" INTEGER /* Size of the contract */,
  "contract_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., futures, options) */,
  "underlying_asset" TEXT /* Underlying asset for the contract (e.g., stock, commodity) */,
  "exchange_id" TEXT /* ID of the exchange where the contract is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_maturity_id FOREIGN KEY ("maturity_id") REFERENCES maturities ("maturity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "contract_id" TEXT /* ID of the contract being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of contracts traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader executing the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed, cancelled) */,
  "trade_execution_time" TEXT /* Time when the trade was executed */,
  "trade_execution_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "trader_status" TEXT /* Status of the trader (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "trader_category" TEXT /* Category of the trader (e.g., individual, institutional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader using the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "market_date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "maturity_id" TEXT /* Reference to the maturity date */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analytics_maturity_id FOREIGN KEY ("maturity_id") REFERENCES maturities ("maturity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analytics_market_date FOREIGN KEY ("market_date") REFERENCES market_data ("market_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "trigger_value" REAL /* Value that triggered the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, trade) */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource accessed (e.g., contract, trade, alert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES market_data ("maturity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" TEXT /* Unique ID of the exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "exchange_location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "exchange_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_expirations" (
  "contract_expiration_id" TEXT /* Unique ID of the contract expiration */,
  "contract_id" TEXT /* ID of the contract */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_expiration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_expirations_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_holidays" (
  "market_holiday_id" TEXT /* Unique ID of the market holiday */,
  "exchange_id" TEXT /* ID of the exchange */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_holiday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_holidays_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" TEXT /* Unique ID of the system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the system setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the system setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
